body:
**CAS residency: at least 64 credits in -UA coursework.**

From the CAS bulletin (§Residency Requirements):

*"All students must complete a minimum of 64 credits in College of Arts and Science coursework (-UA suffix)."*

Key rules from the same section:
- *"Courses taken in other NYU schools (i.e., without a -UA suffix) do not count toward the 64-credit minimum."*
- NYU Abu Dhabi (-AD/UH) and NYU Shanghai (-SHU) courses do **not** count toward the 64-credit minimum either. **However, -UA study-away courses DO count.**
- *"Students must complete their last 32 credits while registered in the College."*
- One-half of the courses used to complete a major (or optional minor) must be taken in the College. Transfer credits cannot satisfy more than half of any departmental requirement.

If you're nearing transfer or considering a study-away program, confirm with your CAS adviser that your specific course mix satisfies the 64-credit floor.
